name: Nectarines and Raspberries with Biscotti Crumbs (June)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the nectarines into a large bowl.
2. Add the berries to the nectarines in the bowl.
3. Stir in the sugar and almond extract, if used.
4. Allow the fruit mixture to stand for 10 to 15 minutes to develop juices.
5. Stir in the biscotti crumbs.
6. Divide the fruit among 6 serving dishes.
